title: Norm of the North: King Sized Adventure
description: Before planning an awesome wedding for his grandfather, a polar bear king must take back a stolen artifact from an evil archaeologist first.

title: Jandino: Whatever it Takes
description: Jandino Asporaat riffs on the challenges of raising kids and serenades the audience with a rousing rendition of "Sex on Fire" in his comedy show.

title: Transformers Prime
description: With the help of three human allies, the Autobots once again protect Earth from the onslaught of the Decepticons and their leader, Megatron.

title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
description: When a prison ship crash unleashes hundreds of Decepticons on Earth, Bumblebee leads a new Autobot force to protect humankind.

title: #realityhigh
description: When nerdy high schooler Dani finally attracts the interest of her longtime crush, she lands in the cross hairs of his ex, a social media celebrity.

title: Apaches
description: A young journalist is forced into a life of crime to save his father and family in this series based on the novel by Miguel Sáez Carral.

title: Automata
description: In a dystopian future, an insurance adjuster for a tech company investigates a robot killed for violating protocol and discovers a global conspiracy.

title: Fabrizio Copano: Solo pienso en mi
description: Fabrizio Copano takes audience participation to the next level in this stand-up set while reflecting on sperm banks, family WhatsApp groups and more.

title: Fire Chasers
description: As California's 2016 fire season rages, brave backcountry firefighters race to put out the flames, protect homes and save lives in this docuseries.

title: Good People
description: A struggling couple can't believe their luck when they find a stash of money in the apartment of a neighbor who was recently murdered.

title: Joaquín Reyes: Una y no más
description: Comedian and celebrity impersonator Joaquín Reyes decides to be his zesty self for a night of stories about buses, bathroom habits, royalty and more.

title: Kidnapping Mr. Heineken
description: When beer magnate Alfred "Freddy" Heineken is kidnapped in 1983, his abductors make the largest ransom demand in history.

title: Krish Trish and Baltiboy
description: A team of minstrels, including a monkey, cat and donkey, narrate folktales from the Indian regions of Rajasthan, Kerala and Punjab.

title: Krish Trish and Baltiboy: Battle of Wits
description: An artisan is cheated of his payment, a lion of his throne and a brother of his inheritance in these three stories of deception and justice.

title: Krish Trish and Baltiboy: Best Friends Forever
description: A cat, monkey and donkey team up to narrate folktales about friendship from Northeast India, and the Indian regions of Bihar and Rajasthan.

title: Krish Trish and Baltiboy: Comics of India
description: In three comic-strip-style tales, a boy tries to sell wisdom, a demon is released from captivity, and a king assigns impossible tasks to his minister.

title: Krish Trish and Baltiboy: Oversmartness Never Pays
description: A cat, monkey and donkey learn the consequences of cheating through stories from the Indian regions of Rajasthan, West Bengal and Maharashtra.

title: Krish Trish and Baltiboy: Part II
description: Animal minstrels narrate stories about a monkey's friendship with a crocodile, two monkeys' foolishness and a villager's encounter with a demon.

title: Krish Trish and Baltiboy: The Greatest Trick
description: The consequences of trickery are explored in stories involving an inconsiderate husband, two greedy courtiers, and a kind man who loses everything.

title: Love
description: A man in an unsatisfying marriage recalls the details of an intense past relationship with an ex-girlfriend when he gets word that she may be missing.

title: Manhattan Romance
description: A filmmaker working on a documentary about love in modern Manhattan becomes personally entangled in the romantic lives of his subjects.

title: Moonwalkers
description: A brain-addled war vet, a failing band manager and a Stanley Kubrick impersonator help the CIA construct an epic scam by faking the 1969 moon landing.

title: Rolling Papers
description: As the newspaper industry takes a hit, The Denver Post breaks new ground with a section dedicated to cannabis culture.

title: Stonehearst Asylum
description: In 1899, a young doctor arrives at an asylum for an apprenticeship and becomes suspicious of his mentor's methods while falling for a female patient.

title: The Runner
description: A New Orleans politician finds his idealistic plans for rebuilding after a toxic oil spill unraveling thanks to a sex scandal.

title: 6 Years
description: As a volatile young couple who have been together for six years approach college graduation, unexpected career opportunities threaten their future.

title: Castle of Stars
description: As four couples with different lifestyles go through the ebbs and flows of joy and sorrow, each must learn how to live a good life.

title: City of Joy
description: Women who've been sexually brutalized in war-torn Congo begin to heal at City of Joy, a center that helps them regain a sense of self and empowerment.

title: First and Last
description: Take an intimate look at the emotionally charged first and last days of new and soon-to-be released inmates at Georgia's Gwinnett County Jail.

title: Laddaland
description: When a family moves into an upscale housing development, they encounter a series of paranormal events that drive them to the edge of insanity.

title: Next Gen
description: When lonely Mai forms an unlikely bond with a top-secret robot, they embark on an intense, action-packed adventure to foil the plot of a vicious villain.

title: Sierra Burgess Is A Loser
description: A wrong-number text sparks a virtual romance between a smart but unpopular teen and a sweet jock who thinks he's talking to a gorgeous cheerleader.

title: The Most Assassinated Woman in the World
description: In 1930s Paris, an actress famous for her gory death scenes at the Grand Guignol Theater contends with a mysterious stalker and ghosts from her past.

title: Cézanne et moi
description: This historical drama explores the long and often volatile friendship of painter Paul Cézanne and writer Émile Zola, who first met as schoolboys.

title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
description: Happy-go-lucky chicken Archibald may not remember to do his chores, but he never forgets to have fun. After all, life's an adventure!

title: Article 15
description: The grim realities of caste discrimination come to light as an entitled but upright city cop ventures into India’s heartland to investigate a murder.

title: Care of Kancharapalem
description: From a schoolboy’s crush to a middle-aged bachelor’s office romance, four love stories spanning age, religion and status unfold in a small Indian town.

title: Ee Nagaraniki Emaindi
description: In Goa and in desperate need of cash, four childhood friends get another shot at making their long-abandoned dreams of becoming filmmakers come true.

title: Kill Me If You Dare
description: Bogged down with money problems, a couple grows cautious of each other but hit the lottery and decide to stay together – till death do they part.

title: The Spy
description: In the 1960s, Israeli clerk-turned-secret agent Eli Cohen goes deep undercover inside Syria on a perilous, years-long mission to spy for Mossad.

title: Hell and Back
description: When best friends break a blood oath, one of them is cast away to hell, and the other two must save him from the misfits of the underworld.

title: PK
description: Aamir Khan teams with director Rajkumar Hirani to play a social crusader in a political satire on the state of corruption in India.

title: Hard Tide
description: A drug dealer who's been emulating his father's successful criminal career is forced to go on the run with a young girl in this fact-based thriller.

title: Elstree 1976
description: Then and now footage of bit players who appeared in "Star Wars" tells the story of how the film and its legions of fans changed their lives forever.

title: American Factory: A Conversation with the Obamas
description: Barack and Michelle Obama talk with directors Steven Bognar and Julia Reichert about the documentary and the importance of storytelling.

title: ATM
description: When a broken ATM dishes out a fortune, a couple who works at the bank vies to see who can recover the most cash – and the loser must find a new job.

title: Bangkok Traffic (Love) Story
description: After an encounter with an engineer working the night shift for the city train, a 30-year-old woman struggles against all odds to pursue true love.

title: I Fine... Thank You... Love You
description: Desperate to go to the U.S. to win back his girlfriend, Yim hires a tutor to teach him English. But things don't go according to plan.

title: One Day
description: When his colleague (and crush) temporarily loses her memory, an overlooked geek seizes the chance to make an impression before she remembers again.

title: Phobia 2
description: From disfiguring punishments to festering souls, Thai horror masters present five supernatural tales of karma in this sequel to the 4bia anthology.
